Name: FTextureLODGroup
Description: LOD settings for a single texture group.

Variables.Name: Group
Variables.Description: Minimum LOD mip count below which the code won't bias.

Variables.Name: NumStreamedMips
Variables.Description: Number of mip-levels that can be streamed. -1 means all mips can stream.

Variables.Name: MipGenSettings
Variables.Description: Defines how the the mip-map generation works, e.g. sharpening
